transcript: We need a person with integrity and grit. We need a person who's ready to work hard, to get things done, to put bipartisan coalitions together to make things happen. We need a person who will never back down from doing the right thing. We need a person with experience. We need a person who can keep our momentum going while blazing new trails. We need a person who can win, and that person is Josh Scott. I'm running for governor because I believe in the promise of this state that if you work hard, where you come from should never limit how far you can go, that our children and grandchildren will enjoy a better and brighter future than we do, that every person has a fair shot at prosperity, to start a small business or get a good job anywhere in North Carolina, including small town North Carolina. And I know that right now in North Carolina, things are tough, but I also know this. The people of North Carolina are always worth fighting for. The teachers who dig into their pockets to buy school supplies, the first responders who put their lives on the line for us are worth fighting for. The parents who work two jobs to provide a better life for their children and the community college students going to school at night to learn a new trade are worth fighting for. People who care for their families are worth fighting for. Will we fight for folks who are working hard but struggling to get ahead? Will we fight for our students and our teachers? Will we fight to keep people safe? Will we fight to protect women's reproductive freedom? Will we fight to defend our right to vote? Then let's do it. Let's fight for our people. Let's defend our home and let's honor the promise of North Carolina.
